title: V-Mart Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: V-Mart Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with V-Mart Retail! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About V-Mart Retail:
V-Mart Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
